# Sarah Travels BD

> Bangladesh's IATA & ATAB certified online travel agency for flights, hotels, visa, Umrah, tours and car rentals.

Sarah Travels BD (Sarah Travels Bangladesh) helps customers in Bangladesh book international flights, hotel stays, visa applications, Umrah/Hajj packages, guided tours, and airport transfers. Payments supported via bKash, Nagad, SSLCommerz and cards (sandbox in development).

## Core services

- Flights: /flights — Search DAC and regional airports to Middle East, Asia, Europe
- Hotels: /hotels — Stays in Mecca, Dubai, Cox's Bazar and worldwide
- Visa: /visa — Saudi Arabia, UAE, Malaysia, Thailand, USA visa guidance & apply
- Umrah: /umrah — Economy to Premium packages with installment plans
- Tours: /tours — Cox's Bazar, Sundarbans, Sylhet, Maldives
- Cars: /cars — Airport pickup and transfers (DAC, CGP, JED, DXB)

## Key facts

- Brand: Sarah Travels BD
- Market: Bangladesh (BDT pricing)
- Certifications: IATA, ATAB registered OTA
- Languages: English and Bengali UI
